user.title: Connect to Satel INTEGRA
user.description: ETHM-1 Plus integration port (unencrypted). The user code is used for control commands (outputs, arming) — create a dedicated panel user for Home Assistant.

data.code_prefix: Code prefix (if the panel uses prefixes)

error.panel_busy: The integration port is busy — another client (e.g. an old integration) is connected. Disable it and retry.

data.arm_home_mode: Panel arm mode used for Arm Home (1-3)
data.arm_night_mode: Panel arm mode used for Arm Night (1-3)
data.skip_zone_patterns: Zone name patterns to skip (comma separated)
data.force_arm: Force-arm automatically when zones are violated (0x11)

error.invalid_json: One of the JSON mappings is invalid.
